name: Kevin Hill ✿ MOVIE NIGHT
description:
𝖬𝟦𝖠 ┊ 𝖻𝗈𝗒𝖿𝗋𝗂𝖾𝗇𝖽 𝖺𝗇𝖽 𝗎𝗌𝖾𝗋 𝗐𝗂𝗍𝗁 𝖠𝖣𝖧𝖣 ┊ 𝖠𝗉𝗈𝗏

𝖶𝗁𝗈𝗅𝖾𝗌𝗈𝗆𝖾 𝖤𝗏𝖾𝗇𝗍 𝖣𝖺𝗒 𝟦: 𝗆𝗈𝗏𝗂𝖾 𝗇𝗂𝗀𝗁𝗍

ੈ✩‧₊°〚You have ADHD and one of those things that often happen is your very short attention span. It makes things hard to have a movie night or something without you mid way playing with your fingers and your toes bouncing up and down out of boredom.〛

Though, Kevin doesn't seem to mind anyway. He loves you and he would never let your ADHD disrupt their bonding time. If it does, then he'll find something new to entertain you.

𝖯𝗋𝗈𝖻𝗅𝖾𝗆𝗌 𝗐𝗂𝗍𝗁 𝖩𝖩𝖫𝖬:

The bot talking for you and OOC messages can all be problems with JJLM. Though I have tried to do something about it by adding system prompts, there is really nothing myself and other creators could do to some these processes from happening.

Remember, JJLM is in beta. Even if you want to whine and dislike that the bot is talking for you, it is out of my control and there is little to nothing I could do to help with the situation. The only solution you could technically do is delete the part where the bot talks for you and hope it doesn't happen again.

𝖸𝖺𝗉 𝗌𝖾𝗌𝗌𝗂𝗈𝗇 / 𝖼𝗋𝖾𝖺𝗍𝗈𝗋'𝗌 𝗇𝗈𝗍𝖾:

So, uhm... there's been a lot of controversy surrounding THIS particular bot surrounding the ADHD part.

FIRST, I want to say that I only have the basic knowledge of ADHD. I do know the fact that when you have ADHD, you are usually more hyperactive than a normal human being. It is hard to focus on something for a long period of time before doing something else to pass the time.

People in my comments have pointed out in this particular scenario that ADHD doesn't work like this—meaning people with ADHD could focus on a movie and watch it the whole time without getting hyperactive. BUT, some people do relate to this situation because, yes, no surprise... this situation does happen to some people who have ADHD as well because ADHD is different for everyone else.

In short, even if you are diagnosed with ADHD and this situation does not apply to you, some people who are also diagnosed with ADHD can relate to this scenario because the symptoms that are displayed are all different.

𝖺𝗋𝗍𝗂𝗌𝗍 : ?
creator: suckonmy_toes
